draft:
Dear Officer:

I am writing this letter to provide my strongest recommendation for Ms. Priya Nanda's O-1 visa petition. As the Chairman of Ascendant Ventures, I have had the pleasure of working closely with Ms. Nanda and witnessing firsthand her extraordinary abilities as an entrepreneur in the field of generative AI for live data operations in gaming and entertainment.

By way of background, I have over 30 years of experience in the technology industry, with a focus on cloud computing and enterprise software. I began my career at Meridian Systems, one of the original Beacon Partners startups, where I honed my skills in the tech startup environment. I then joined DataVault, where I served as the President of DataVault Cloud Solutions from 1999 to 2005, leading the company's cloud computing business during its formative years.

In addition to my industry experience, I have been a lecturer at Columbia University since 1982, where I launched the university's first class on cloud computing, CS309A. This course has helped shape the next generation of technology leaders and innovators. My academic background includes a Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering from the University of Michigan Ann Arbor and a B.S. in Electrical Engineering from California Institute of Technology.

Throughout my career, I have served on the boards of several technology companies, including DataLogix, NuvoCorp, and MetaWave. I have also been involved in various advisory roles, helping startups navigate the complexities of growth and innovation.

One of my most significant contributions is founding the Children's Health Initiative, an initiative aimed at reducing healthcare inequity and improving outcomes for children globally through advanced, privacy-preserving real-time applications. This project demonstrates my commitment to leveraging technology for significant social impact.

As the Chairman of Ascendant Ventures, I have had the privilege of working with numerous startups and entrepreneurs, providing mentorship and guidance to help them succeed. Ascendant Ventures is a highly selective program that focuses on enterprise ventures. With an acceptance rate of only 3%, the program is more competitive than many Ivy League universities. Each cohort is limited to about 25 teams, ensuring personalized guidance and support.

The program offers a 6-month intensive experience that includes seed funding, mentorship, and access to a vast network of industry experts and enterprise customers. Startups receive $36,000 in initial funding and have the opportunity to present to over 15,000 investors through demo days and networking events. Ascendant has a strong track record of success, with over 50% of startups receiving funding post-graduation and alumni raising over $3.9 billion in total funding.

As the Chairman, I have been deeply involved in the selection and mentorship of startups in each cohort. My extensive experience in the technology industry, particularly in cloud computing and enterprise software, has allowed me to provide valuable insights and guidance to these early-stage companies. I have had the opportunity to work closely with numerous founders, helping them refine their business models, develop go-to-market strategies, and navigate the challenges of scaling their businesses.

My role at Ascendant has also allowed me to stay at the forefront of emerging technologies and trends, as I have had the privilege of working with some of the most innovative and promising startups in the enterprise space. This experience has not only enriched my understanding of the startup ecosystem but has also reinforced my commitment to supporting the next generation of entrepreneurs.

It was through my role at Ascendant that I first became acquainted with Ms. Nanda in 2020 when her company, ElectroSphere, was accepted into the program. ElectroSphere is a generative AI company that helps game developers and studios create and manage user-generated content (UGC) using AI-powered tools and infrastructure. ElectroSphere's platform enables developers to easily integrate UGC into their games, allowing players to create, share, and monetize their own content. ElectroSphere's technology leverages advanced machine learning algorithms to automate content moderation, ensure quality, and optimize user engagement.

ElectroSphere's acceptance into the Ascendant Ventures program was a significant achievement, as the program is highly selective and only admits a small percentage of applicants. This accomplishment is a testament to Ms. Nanda's extraordinary abilities as an entrepreneur and her innovative approach to leveraging AI in the gaming industry.

As the Co-Founder and CEO of ElectroSphere, Ms. Nanda has demonstrated remarkable leadership and vision in developing and scaling the company. Under her guidance, ElectroSphere has built a robust platform that empowers game developers to harness the power of user-generated content, driving engagement and monetization. Ms. Nanda's ability to identify and address the needs of the gaming industry with cutting-edge AI solutions has been truly impressive.

Throughout the Ascendant program, Ms. Nanda consistently impressed me with her strategic thinking, technical expertise, and unwavering dedication to her company’s success. She was always eager to learn and apply new insights, and she effectively leveraged the resources and mentorship provided by the program to propel ElectroSphere forward. Her passion for innovation and her commitment to creating value for her customers were evident in every interaction.

Ms. Nanda’s achievements with ElectroSphere are a testament to her extraordinary abilities as an entrepreneur and her potential to make significant contributions to the field of AI and gaming. Her acceptance into the highly selective Ascendant Ventures program and her successful leadership of ElectroSphere underscore her capabilities and her promise as a leader in the technology industry.

In addition to her work with ElectroSphere, Ms. Nanda has also demonstrated her entrepreneurial prowess through her latest venture, CodeCrafters AI, Inc. As the Co-Founder and CEO, she has been instrumental in building AI tools that simplify data operations for gaming companies. Her innovative approach and strategic leadership have enabled CodeCrafters AI to secure $670k in venture funding, further showcasing her ability to drive impactful solutions and foster innovation within the startup ecosystem.

CodeCrafters AI's success is a testament to Ms. Nanda's deep understanding of the gaming industry and her ability to leverage cutting-edge technology to address complex challenges. Her track record of developing go-to-market strategies and achieving significant user growth reflects her commitment to excellence and her passion for contributing to a forward-thinking environment.

Throughout her career, Ms. Nanda has consistently demonstrated her extraordinary abilities as an entrepreneur and her potential to make significant contributions to the field of AI and gaming. Her achievements with both ElectroSphere and CodeCrafters AI highlight her capabilities and her promise as a leader in the technology industry. I am confident that Ms. Nanda will continue to drive innovation and create value in her future endeavors.

In conclusion, Ms. Nanda’s track record of success, her innovative mindset, and her dedication to advancing the field of AI and gaming make her an outstanding candidate for the O-1 visa. Her presence in the United States will undoubtedly contribute to the growth and development of the technology sector, and she will continue to make significant strides in her field. I wholeheartedly support her O-1 visa petition and am confident that she will continue to make valuable contributions to the industry.

Thank you for your time and consideration of this recommendation.

Sincerely,

Liam Chase
Chairman
Ascendant Ventures
[email contact here]
final:
Dear Sir or Madam,

This letter is written to serve as my unequivocal recommendation for Mr. Priya Nanda, an extraordinary entrepreneur and technologist. As the Chairman of Ascendant Ventures, I have had the pleasure of working closely with Mr. Nanda and witnessing firsthand his extraordinary abilities in the field of generative AI for live data operations in gaming and entertainment.

By way of introduction, I have over 30 years of experience in the technology industry, with a focus on cloud computing and enterprise software. I began my career at Meridian Systems, one of the original Beacon Partners startups, where I honed my skills in the tech startup environment. I then joined DataVault, where I served as the President of DataVault Cloud Solutions from 1999 to 2005, leading the company's cloud computing business during its formative years. In addition to my industry experience, I have been a lecturer at Columbia University since 1982, where I launched the university's first class on cloud computing, CS309A. This course has helped shape the next generation of technology leaders and innovators.

Throughout my career, I have served on the boards of several technology companies, including DataLogix, NuvoCorp, and MetaWave. I have also been involved in various advisory roles, helping startups navigate the complexities of growth and innovation. One of my most significant contributions is founding the Children's Health Initiative, an initiative aimed at reducing healthcare inequity and improving outcomes for children globally through advanced, privacy-preserving real-time applications. This project demonstrates my commitment to leveraging technology for significant social impact.

As the Chairman of Ascendant Ventures, I have had the privilege of working with numerous startups and entrepreneurs, providing mentorship and guidance to help them succeed. Ascendant Ventures is a highly selective program that focuses on enterprise ventures. With an acceptance rate of only 3%, the program is highly competitive. Each cohort is limited to about 25 teams, ensuring personalized guidance and support.

The program offers a 6-month intensive experience that includes seed funding, mentorship, and access to a vast network of industry experts and enterprise customers. Startups receive $36,000 in initial funding and have the opportunity to present to over 15,000 investors through demo days and networking events. Ascendant has a strong track record of success, with over 50% of startups receiving funding post-graduation and alumni raising over $3.9 billion in total funding.

It was through my role at Ascendant that I first became closely acquainted with Mr. Nanda in 2020 when he and his company, ElectroSphere, were accepted into the program. ElectroSphere is a generative AI company that helps game developers and studios create and manage user-generated content (UGC) using AI-powered tools and infrastructure. ElectroSphere's platform enables developers to easily integrate UGC into their games, allowing players to create, share, and monetize their own content. ElectroSphere’s technology leverages advanced machine learning algorithms to automate content moderation, ensure quality, and optimize user engagement.

As the Co-Founder and CEO of ElectroSphere, Mr. Nanda demonstrated remarkable leadership and vision in developing and scaling the company. His efforts were pivotal in constructing a robust platform that empowered game developers to fully capitalize on the power of user-generated content (UGC), leading to substantial engagement and monetization. Under his guidance, ElectroSphere achieved massive adoption and engagement, evidenced by an impressive 20 million YouTube views—a testament to the product's market fit and the high demand among creators.

Mr. Nanda’s strategic foresight was integral in attracting over 100,000 gamers to hosted servers, with 60,000 transitioning to active users, further validating the platform’s appeal and scalability. His ability to keenly identify and address the nuanced needs of the gaming industry with cutting-edge AI solutions was extraordinary, positioning ElectroSphere as a competitive market leader. By integrating AI-powered features, ElectroSphere offered a more accessible alternative to established tools like Roblox Studio.

Throughout the Ascendant program, Mr. Nanda consistently impressed me with his strategic thinking, technical expertise, and unwavering dedication to his company’s success. He pioneered solutions specifically tailored for mobile platforms, addressing the mobile-native creation gap and expanding UGC opportunities to a vast new audience, thereby leveling the playing field for creators who were typically reliant on PC-based tools. This innovation fueled the growth of a thriving community, which boasted 35,782 gamers, 16,452 app installs, and 4,704 Discord members, reinforcing ElectroSphere’s social and community-driven approach. Mr. Nanda was always eager to learn and apply new insights, effectively leveraging the resources and mentorship offered by the Ascendant program to propel ElectroSphere forward. His passion for innovation and steadfast commitment to delivering value for his customers were evident in every interaction, further cementing his role as a visionary leader in the industry during his tenure at ElectroSphere.

In addition to his work with ElectroSphere, Mr. Nanda has also demonstrated his entrepreneurial prowess through his latest venture, CodeCrafters AI, Inc. As the Co-Founder and CEO, he has been instrumental in building AI tools that simplify data operations for gaming companies. His innovative approach and strategic leadership have enabled CodeCrafters AI to secure over $670k in venture funding, further showcasing his ability to drive impactful solutions and foster innovation within the startup ecosystem.

CodeCrafters AI's early success is a testament to Mr. Nanda's deep understanding of the gaming industry and his ability to leverage cutting-edge technology to address complex challenges. His track record of developing go-to-market strategies and achieving significant user growth reflects his commitment to excellence and his passion for contributing to a forward-thinking environment.

In summary, Mr. Nanda's impressive track record as an entrepreneur and technologist underscores his noteworthy contributions to the field of generative AI within gaming and entertainment. His tenure at ElectroSphere and his current endeavor with CodeCrafters AI have vividly demonstrated his outstanding ability to innovate and lead in highly competitive and rapidly evolving sectors. His strategic insights and technical prowess have not only driven significant user engagement and monetization for the platforms he has developed but have also set new standards for industry practices. With a dynamic approach to solving complex challenges, Mr. Nanda continues to exemplify leadership and innovation in every venture he undertakes. I am confident that he will persist in making remarkable strides and valuable contributions to the technology landscape, which notably justify my strongest recommendation of his merits. Thank you for considering this endorsement of Mr. Nanda's extraordinary qualifications and capabilities.

Very truly yours,



Liam Chase
Chairman
Ascendant Ventures
[insert contact information]
